output.modified_sql:
SELECT
    e.CCSID,
    e.SITELINKREFERENCEID,
    e.TEXT_TEMPLATESITELINKID,
    v.VENUE_NAME,
    e.LASTUPDATEDATE
FROM {{ source('ecomm_application', 'pricing_analytics_events') }} e
LEFT JOIN {{ ref('dim_venue') }} v ON e.VENUE_ID = v.VENUE_ID
changes_made: Added table aliases e and v
output.style_notes: Added table aliases since JOIN requires disambiguation

decision_log.decision: Added LEFT JOIN with table aliases
decision_log.rationale: JOIN requires aliases. LEFT preserves all source rows.
